title: GoldenCase
description: One hand-scored golden example derived from a PRD requirement.

name.description: Short human-readable label for the case.

prdRequirementIds.description: IDs of the PRD requirements/metrics/guardrails this case traces to.

scenario.description: What situation this case represents (happy path, edge case, unsupported content, failure mode).

userPersona.description: Target user acting in this scenario, if relevant.

input.description: The input given to the system under test. Shape is product-specific.

expectedOutput.description: The expected output or the properties it must satisfy. May be exact or descriptive.

expectedArtifacts.description: Files, documents, or assets that must be present in the output.

hardFailGates.description: Binary conditions that fail the case regardless of score.

scoringWeights.description: Map of scoring dimension -> weight (weights should sum to 1.0).

humanScore.description: Hand-assigned reference score in [0,1], null until labeled.

notes.description: Reviewer notes, rationale, or calibration comments.
